event.event_summary: Synthetic second fixture: a commerce cloud company sells off after guidance, with the replay designed to test multi-case timestamp filtering and provenance metadata.

narratives.title: Forward demand slowdown
narratives.narrative: The selloff is primarily driven by concern that merchant demand and expansion revenue are slowing, not by a one-time implementation cost issue.
narratives.mechanism: Lower expected merchant expansion would reduce forward revenue estimates and compress the valuation multiple for a growth-sensitive commerce software equity.
expected_observables: Analysts reduce forward revenue or gross merchandise volume estimates within 30 days
The stock underperforms a peer basket over the next 20 trading days
Future company commentary focuses on merchant retention, sales-cycle length, or attach rates

supporting_evidence.claim: The company lowered next-quarter merchant expansion guidance relative to prior management commentary.
supporting_evidence.title: Synthetic source
supporting_evidence.claim_extracted: The company lowered next-quarter merchant expansion guidance relative to prior management commentary.

supporting_evidence.claim: Multiple analyst questions focused on merchant churn, sales-cycle length, and lower attach-rate commentary.
supporting_evidence.title: Synthetic source
supporting_evidence.claim_extracted: Multiple analyst questions focused on merchant churn, sales-cycle length, and lower attach-rate commentary.

supporting_evidence.claim: Future validation fixture: several analysts later reduced forward revenue and GMV estimates.
supporting_evidence.title: Synthetic source
supporting_evidence.claim_extracted: Future validation fixture: several analysts later reduced forward revenue and GMV estimates.

contradicting_evidence.claim: Current-quarter revenue still exceeded consensus expectations.
contradicting_evidence.title: Synthetic source
contradicting_evidence.claim_extracted: Current-quarter revenue still exceeded consensus expectations.

narratives.title: Margin compression
narratives.narrative: The stock moved because investors focused on near-term gross margin pressure from implementation support and infrastructure costs.
narratives.mechanism: Lower margins would reduce near-term earnings and free cash flow, pressuring valuation if investors view the cost increase as recurring.
expected_observables: Near-term EPS estimates decline more than revenue estimates
Management emphasizes implementation efficiency or infrastructure cost control in follow-up commentary
Peers with similar margin pressure also trade down

supporting_evidence.claim: Early headlines framed the selloff around margin disappointment and rising implementation support costs.
supporting_evidence.title: Synthetic source
supporting_evidence.claim_extracted: Early headlines framed the selloff around margin disappointment and rising implementation support costs.

contradicting_evidence.claim: Gross margin improved year over year despite higher implementation support costs.
contradicting_evidence.title: Synthetic source
contradicting_evidence.claim_extracted: Gross margin improved year over year despite higher implementation support costs.

narratives.title: Sector-wide derating
narratives.narrative: The move reflects a broader derating of commerce software equities rather than a company-specific issue.
narratives.mechanism: Higher discount rates or weaker risk appetite would compress multiples across the group, causing peer-correlated price action.
expected_observables: Peers and sector ETF experience comparable drawdowns
Price action tracks macro or sector factors more than company disclosures

supporting_evidence.claim: The commerce software peer basket was negative on the event morning.
supporting_evidence.title: Synthetic source
supporting_evidence.claim_extracted: The commerce software peer basket was negative on the event morning.

contradicting_evidence.claim: Aurora underperformed its commerce software peer median by roughly ten percentage points during the event window.
contradicting_evidence.title: Synthetic source
contradicting_evidence.claim_extracted: Aurora underperformed its commerce software peer median by roughly ten percentage points during the event window.

narratives.title: Overreaction to noisy guidance
narratives.narrative: The market may be overreacting to conservative guidance that does not materially change long-term cash-flow power.
narratives.mechanism: If the guidance reset is conservative and fundamentals stabilize, the initial selloff could reverse as investors reprice the event as temporary noise.
expected_observables: Revenue estimates stabilize after the first wave of revisions
Management or channel data indicates demand is not deteriorating
The stock recovers relative to peers after headline pressure fades

supporting_evidence.claim: Full-year free cash flow guidance was maintained despite lower near-term merchant expansion guidance.
supporting_evidence.title: Synthetic source
supporting_evidence.claim_extracted: Full-year free cash flow guidance was maintained despite lower near-term merchant expansion guidance.
